descriptionShort: Toronto Star hockey column covering NHL trades, AHL games, and player anecdotes from November 1992.
descriptionLong: This Toronto Star sports section article from November 2, 1992, reports on multiple hockey developments: an NHL trade of defenceman Paul Cavallini from St. Louis to Washington for centre Kevin Miller; a record-setting 10-2 victory by the St. John's Maple Leafs over Hershey in the AHL with Yanic Perrault scoring three goals; and humorous anecdotes about NHL players, including Red Wings defenceman Dennis Vial's tax policy commentary and a Soviet player's experience at Denny's.
